room_rent_limit_raw: Single Private AC Room; ICU up to SI (Optional Premium Management caps to ₹3,000/day room)
best_for: Senior citizens (56-75 yrs) seeking price-sensitive base plan with simplistic onboarding (no pre-policy medical checkup)

ped_waiting_period_raw: 24 Months (reducible to 90 days via optional Reduction in PED Waiting Period cover)
room_rent_limit_raw: Single Private AC Room; ICU up to Sum Insured (Any Room Upgrade optional, no proportionate deduction)
best_for: Senior citizens wanting enhanced/richer cover: unlimited restoration, Air Ambulance, Daily Cash, Domestic 2nd Opinion & Premium Waiver included as base

ped_waiting_period_raw: From 91st day (optional cover) for Diabetes, Hypertension, Asthma, Dyslipidemia, Obesity
room_rent_limit_raw: Not Mentioned
best_for: Customers with pre-existing conditions (Diabetes, Hypertension, Asthma, Dyslipidemia, Obesity) wanting cover from 91st day, zero non-medical deductions

sum_insured_raw: ₹3/4/5/7.5/10/12.5/15/20/25/30/40/50/100 Lacs (₹3L & 4L available only with Protect Plan)
room_rent_limit_raw: Single Private AC Room; ICU up to SI (Assure package: Room Rent up to 1% of SI/day, ICU up to 2% of SI/day)
best_for: Customers wanting flexible deductible options and lower premium (no OPD) with optional add-ons like Critical Illness, Infertility & International cover

room_rent_limit_raw: Single Private AC Room; ICU up to Sum Insured
best_for: Customers wanting OPD cover included along with comprehensive hospitalization benefits - richer plan than Protect

policy_type: Additional Hospitalization Coverage (Top-up, Individual/Family Floater, 2A+3C max)
ped_waiting_period_raw: 36 Months (reducible to 24 months via optional Reduction in PED Waiting Period cover, one-time additional premium)
